001/*
002 * Licensed to the Apache Software Foundation (ASF) under one or more
003 * contributor license agreements.  See the NOTICE file distributed with
004 * this work for additional information regarding copyright ownership.
005 * The ASF licenses this file to You under the Apache License, Version 2.0
006 * (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with
007 * the License.  You may obtain a copy of the License at
008 *
009 *      http://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0
010 *
011 * Unless required by applicable law or agreed to in writing, software
012 * distributed under the License is distributed on an "AS IS" BASIS,
013 * WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
014 * See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020
021import java.io.*;
022import java.util.*;
023import java.util.concurrent.*;
024
025import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
026import org.apache.juneau.commons.collections.*;
027import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
030
031/**
032 * Serializes POJO models to Markdown (fragment mode: tables and lists).
033 *
034 * <h5 class='topic'>Media types</h5>
035 * <p>
036 * Handles <c>Accept</c> types:  <bc>text/markdown, text/x-markdown</bc>
037 * <p>
038 * Produces <c>Content-Type</c> types:  <bc>text/markdown</bc>
039 *
040 * <h5 class='topic'>Description</h5>
041 * <p>
042 * The conversion is as follows:
043 * <ul class='spaced-list'>
044 *    <li>Beans and Maps are serialized as 2-column key/value Markdown tables.
045 *    <li>Collections and arrays of beans/maps with uniform structure are serialized as multi-column Markdown tables.
046 *    <li>Collections and arrays of simple values are serialized as Markdown bulleted lists.
047 *    <li>Nested beans and complex values in table cells are serialized as inline JSON5 wrapped in backticks.
048 *    <li>Null values are rendered as <js>"*null*"</js> (italic) by default.
049 * </ul>
050 *
051 * <h5 class='section'>Example:</h5>
052 * <p class='bjava'>
053 *    <jc>// Use the default serializer to serialize a bean</jc>
054 *    String <jv>md</jv> = MarkdownSerializer.<jsf>DEFAULT</jsf>.serialize(<jv>someObject</jv>);
055 *
056 *    <jc>// Create a custom serializer</jc>
057 *    MarkdownSerializer <jv>serializer</jv> = MarkdownSerializer.<jsm>create</jsm>().nullValue(<js>"—"</js>).build();
058 *
059 *    <jc>// Serialize a List of beans to a multi-column Markdown table</jc>
060 *    String <jv>md</jv> = <jv>serializer</jv>.serialize(<jv>listOfBeans</jv>);
061 * </p>
062 *
063 * <h5 class='figure'>Example output (bean):</h5>
064 * <p class='bcode'>
065 *    | Property | Value |
066 *    |---|---|
067 *    | name | Alice |
068 *    | age | 30 |
069 * </p>
070 *
071 * <h5 class='section'>Limitations:</h5><ul>
072 *    <li class='note'>Multi-line string values cannot round-trip; newlines are replaced with {@code <br>}.
073 *    <li class='note'>The configured null value string (default: {@code *null*}) cannot be stored as a literal string value.
074 *    <li class='note'>This serializer is thread safe and reusable.
075 * </ul>
076 *
077 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
078 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/Markdown">Markdown Basics</a>
079 * </ul>
080 */
081@SuppressWarnings({
082   "java:S110", // Inheritance depth acceptable for this class hierarchy
083   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
084   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's serializer session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
085})
086public class MarkdownSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements MarkdownMetaProvider, RecordWritable {
087
088   private static final String ARG_copyFrom = "copyFrom";
089   private static final String CONST_null = "*null*";
090
091   /**
092    * Builder class.
093    */
094   @SuppressWarnings({
095      "java:S119" // 'SELF' (CRTP self-type) is intentional and clearer than a single-letter name.
096   })
097   public abstract static class Builder<SELF extends Builder<SELF>> extends WriterSerializer.Builder<SELF> {
098
099      private static final Cache<HashKey,MarkdownSerializer> CACHE = Cache.of(HashKey.class, MarkdownSerializer.class).build();
100
101      String nullValue;
102      boolean showHeaders;
103
104      /**
105       * Constructor, default settings.
106       */
107      protected Builder() {
108         produces("text/markdown");
109         accept("text/markdown,text/x-markdown");
110         nullValue = CONST_null;
111         showHeaders = true;
112      }
113
114      /**
115       * Copy constructor.
116       *
117       * @param copyFrom The builder to copy from.
118       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
119       */
120      protected Builder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
121         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
122         nullValue = copyFrom.nullValue;
123         showHeaders = copyFrom.showHeaders;
124      }
125
126      /**
127       * Copy constructor.
128       *
129       * @param copyFrom The bean to copy from.
130       *    <br>Cannot be <jk>null</jk>.
131       */
132      protected Builder(MarkdownSerializer copyFrom) {
133         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_copyFrom, copyFrom));
134         nullValue = copyFrom.nullValue;
135         showHeaders = copyFrom.showHeaders;
136      }
137
138      /**
139       * The string to render for null values.
140       *
141       * <p>
142       * Default is {@code *null*} (rendered as Markdown italic).
143       *
144       * @param value The null marker string.
145       * @return This object.
146       */
147      public SELF nullValue(String value) {
148         nullValue = value == null ? CONST_null : value;
149         return self();
150      }
151
152      /**
153       * Whether to show table header rows.
154       *
155       * <p>
156       * Default is <jk>true</jk>.
157       *
158       * @param value Whether to show headers.
159       * @return This object.
160       */
161      public SELF showHeaders(boolean value) {
162         showHeaders = value;
163         return self();
164      }
165
166      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
167      public HashKey hashKey() {
168         return HashKey.of(super.hashKey(), nullValue, showHeaders);
169      }
170
171      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
172      public MarkdownSerializer build() {
173         return cache(CACHE).build(MarkdownSerializer.class);
174      }
175
176      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
177      public abstract SELF copy();
178
179
180   }
181
182   /**
183    * Concrete default builder leaf for the non-subclassed {@link MarkdownSerializer#create()} / {@link MarkdownSerializer#copy()} path.
184    */
185   public static final class DefaultBuilder extends Builder<DefaultBuilder> {
186
187      DefaultBuilder() {}
188
189      DefaultBuilder(MarkdownSerializer copyFrom) {
190         super(copyFrom);
191      }
192
193      DefaultBuilder(Builder<?> copyFrom) {
194         super(copyFrom);
195      }
196
197      @Override /* Overridden from Context.Builder<?> */
198      public DefaultBuilder copy() {
199         return new DefaultBuilder(this);
200      }
201   }
202
203   /**
204    * Default serializer, all default settings.
205    */
206   public static final MarkdownSerializer DEFAULT = new MarkdownSerializer(create());
207
208   /**
209    * Creates a new builder for this object.
210    *
211    * @return A new builder.
212    */
213   @SuppressWarnings({
214      "java:S1452" // Builder<?> wildcard return intentional; callers chain via fluent API without needing the concrete type
215   })
216   public static Builder<?> create() {
217      return new DefaultBuilder();
218   }
219
220   private final Map<ClassMeta<?>,MarkdownClassMeta> markdownClassMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
221   private final Map<BeanPropertyMeta,MarkdownBeanPropertyMeta> markdownBeanPropertyMetas = new ConcurrentHashMap<>();
222   final String nullValue;
223   final boolean showHeaders;
224
225   /**
226    * Constructor.
227    *
228    * @param builder The builder for this object.
229    */
230   public MarkdownSerializer(Builder<?> builder) {
231      super(builder);
232      nullValue = builder.nullValue != null ? builder.nullValue : CONST_null;
233      showHeaders = builder.showHeaders;
234   }
235
236   /**
237    * Returns the string rendered for null values.
238    *
239    * @return The null marker.
240    */
241   public String getNullValue() {
242      return nullValue;
243   }
244
245   /**
246    * Returns whether table headers are shown.
247    *
248    * @return Whether headers are shown.
249    */
250   public boolean isShowHeaders() {
251      return showHeaders;
252   }
253
254   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
255   public Builder<?> copy() {
256      return new DefaultBuilder(this);
257   }
258
259   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
260   public MarkdownSerializerSession.Builder<?> createSession() {
261      return MarkdownSerializerSession.create(this);
262   }
263
264   @Override /* Overridden from MarkdownMetaProvider */
265   public MarkdownBeanPropertyMeta getMarkdownBeanPropertyMeta(BeanPropertyMeta bpm) {
266      if (bpm == null)
267         return MarkdownBeanPropertyMeta.DEFAULT;
268      return markdownBeanPropertyMetas.computeIfAbsent(bpm, k -> new MarkdownBeanPropertyMeta(k.getDelegateFor(), this));
269   }
270
271   @Override /* Overridden from MarkdownMetaProvider */
272   public MarkdownClassMeta getMarkdownClassMeta(ClassMeta<?> cm) {
273      return markdownClassMetas.computeIfAbsent(cm, k -> new MarkdownClassMeta(k, this));
274   }
275
276   @Override /* Overridden from Context */
277   public MarkdownSerializerSession getSession() { return createSession().build(); }
278
279   /**
280    * Convenience delegator that opens a {@link RecordWriter} over the output using
281    * <b>default session arguments</b> (mirrors {@link #serialize(Object)}).
282    *
283    * <p>
284    * The real implementation lives on {@link MarkdownSerializerSession#serializeRecords(Object)}.
285    * Callers that need request-derived configuration should call {@link #createSession()} and
286    * invoke {@link MarkdownSerializerSession#serializeRecords(Object)} on the built session instead.
287    *
288    * @param output The output.
289    * @return A new {@link RecordWriter}.
290    * @throws IOException If a problem occurred opening the underlying output.
291    */
292   @Override /* RecordWritable */
293   public RecordWriter serializeRecords(Object output) throws IOException {
294      return getSession().serializeRecords(output);
295   }
296
297   @Override /* RecordWritable */
298   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
299      return false;
300   }
301}
